6 ?07 0000000000 a

Constant
6 C 6 1111111111 a mismatch
6 C 6n 0000000000 a match 1/1
all match C 6n

6 I 0 0000001011 3 mismatch

6 AND 07 0000001001 2 mismatch

0 I 2

7 I 0

Applying to 10111110
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 2 = 1
1 I 3 = 1
2 I 4 = 1
3 I 5 = 1
4 I 6 = 1
5 I 7 = 0
6 C 6n = NOT(1) = 0
7 I 0 = 1

\boxed{11111001}
